personalInfo.name: Shivanand Pradhan
personalInfo.title: Full Stack Developer | Backend Specialist
personalInfo.bio: Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience architecting scalable backend microservices and responsive frontend applications. Proficient in Java, Spring Boot (Reactive), and React.js with a proven track record of optimizing API performance and reducing latency.
personalInfo.longBio: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer who bridges the gap between powerful backend systems and intuitive frontend experiences. With a strong foundation from NIT Srinagar and hands-on experience at Publicis Sapient, I've successfully delivered enterprise-grade solutions for Verizon's customer acquisition flows. While my core expertise lies in Java and Spring Boot microservices, I'm equally comfortable building responsive UIs with React.js. I thrive on solving complex problems, optimizing performance, and collaborating across teams to deliver business-critical solutions.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
education.description: Comprehensive curriculum covering Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Management Systems, Operating Systems, and Computer Networks.

education.institution: Shiksha Niketan Senior Secondary School, Jammu
education.description: Specialized in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics with distinction.

education.institution: Shiksha Niketan Senior Secondary School, Jammu
education.description: Foundation education with focus on Science and Mathematics.

responsibilities: Led migration from Total Wireless BAU to NSA architecture, implementing session management, distributed caching, and reactive API optimizations to achieve sub-2-second SLA compliance
Engineered distributed caching layer with Cassandra handling 40% traffic surge, reducing API response time from 3s to 1.5s and significantly improving page load performance
Developed GraphQL APIs to eliminate over-fetching and optimize data retrieval for downstream services and frontend clients, improving overall system efficiency
Created Groovy scripts for seamless Cassandra data retrieval and built a common AEM framework, cutting API development time by 60% and streamlining cross-team collaboration
Optimized reactive APIs across aggregate and domain layers using parallel processing techniques, achieving sub-2-second SLA validated by Gatling load testing
Delivered a full-stack MVP for the Women in Retail platform with secure authentication, role-based access control, group creation, and image/text posting using React.js and Spring Boot
Maintained 100% test coverage for new merge requests with zero SonarQube issues, ensuring production-grade code quality and long-term maintainability
Architected database schemas and supported CI/CD pipeline setup, ensuring data integrity and reliable deployments across platforms
